
```{r}
library(tidyverse)
library(AnnotationDbi)
library(clusterProfiler)
library(org.Sc.sgd.db)
library(org.Mm.eg.db)
```


```{r}

yeast_rnaseq     <- read_tsv("../data/complex_yeast_heatshock.tsv")

mouse_fpkm       <- read_csv("../data/mouse_WT_heatshock_FPKM_clean.csv")

mouse_yeast_hom  <- read_csv("../data/Mouse_Homologene_mapping.csv")

```

```{r}
map_mouse_ensg_to_entrez <- function(mouse_degs) {
  mouse_degs %>%
    mutate(gene_id = as.character(ensembl_id)) %>%
    filter(str_detect(gene_id, "^ENSMUSG")) %>%
    mutate(ensembl = sub("\\..*$", "", gene_id)) %>%
    mutate(
      entrez = AnnotationDbi::mapIds(
        org.Mm.eg.db,
        keys = ensembl,
        keytype = "ENSEMBL",
        column = "ENTREZID",
        multiVals = "first"
      ) %>% as.character()
    ) %>%
    filter(!is.na(entrez)) %>%
    mutate(
      symbol = AnnotationDbi::mapIds(
        org.Mm.eg.db,
        keys = entrez,
        keytype = "ENTREZID",
        column = "SYMBOL",
        multiVals = "first"
      ) %>% as.character()
    )
}

```

## Maping Yeast Ids to ENTREZ

```{r}

safe_mapIds <- function(db, keys_vec, keytype, column = "ENTREZID") {
  keys_vec <- unique(as.character(keys_vec))
  keys_vec <- keys_vec[!is.na(keys_vec)]
  if (length(keys_vec) == 0) return(setNames(character(0), character(0)))

  valid <- intersect(keys_vec, AnnotationDbi::keys(db, keytype = keytype))
  if (length(valid) == 0) return(setNames(character(0), character(0)))

  AnnotationDbi::mapIds(
    db,
    keys      = valid,
    keytype   = keytype,
    column    = column,
    multiVals = "first"
  )
}


clean_yeast_id <- function(x) {
  x <- as.character(x)
  x <- str_trim(x)
  x <- str_split_fixed(x, "\\|", 2)[, 1]   
  x <- str_replace(x, "^[A-Za-z]+:", "")   
  x <- str_replace(x, "\\.[0-9]+$", "")    
  x
}


map_yeast_to_entrez <- function(df, id_col = "gene_id", keep_debug_cols = TRUE) {
  stopifnot(id_col %in% colnames(df))

  out <- df %>%
    mutate(
      .raw_id   = as.character(.data[[id_col]]),
      .clean_id = clean_yeast_id(.raw_id),
      entrez    = NA_character_
    )

  ids <- out$.clean_id

  is_numeric <- str_detect(ids, "^[0-9]+$")
  out$entrez[is_numeric] <- ids[is_numeric]

  is_orf <- str_detect(ids, "^Y[A-P][LR][0-9]{3}[CW](-[A-Z])?$")
  m_orf  <- safe_mapIds(org.Sc.sgd.db, ids[is_orf], keytype = "ORF")

  fill_back <- function(map_vec) {
    if (length(map_vec) == 0) return()
    idx <- match(names(map_vec), out$.clean_id)
    ok  <- !is.na(idx) & is.na(out$entrez[idx])
    out$entrez[idx[ok]] <<- as.character(map_vec)[ok]
  }

  fill_back(m_orf)

  remaining <- out$.clean_id[is.na(out$entrez)]
  kt <- keytypes(org.Sc.sgd.db)

  if ("SGD"      %in% kt) fill_back(safe_mapIds(org.Sc.sgd.db, remaining, "SGD"))
  if ("GENENAME"%in% kt) fill_back(safe_mapIds(org.Sc.sgd.db, remaining, "GENENAME"))
  if ("COMMON"  %in% kt) fill_back(safe_mapIds(org.Sc.sgd.db, remaining, "COMMON"))
  if ("ALIAS"   %in% kt) fill_back(safe_mapIds(org.Sc.sgd.db, remaining, "ALIAS"))
  if ("UNIPROT" %in% kt) fill_back(safe_mapIds(org.Sc.sgd.db, remaining, "UNIPROT"))
  if ("REFSEQ"  %in% kt) fill_back(safe_mapIds(org.Sc.sgd.db, remaining, "REFSEQ"))

  stats <- list(
    n_rows           = nrow(out),
    n_unique_raw     = n_distinct(out$.raw_id),
    n_unique_clean   = n_distinct(out$.clean_id),
    n_mapped_rows    = sum(!is.na(out$entrez)),
    frac_mapped      = mean(!is.na(out$entrez)),
    n_unique_entrez  = n_distinct(out$entrez[!is.na(out$entrez)])
  )

  if (!keep_debug_cols) {
    out <- out %>% select(-.raw_id, -.clean_id)
  }

  list(data = out, stats = stats)
}
```

Yeast background: map raw yeast IDs
```{r}
mapped_yeast <- map_yeast_to_entrez(yeast_rnaseq, id_col = "gene_id", keep_debug_cols = TRUE)
mapped_yeast$stats

yeast_bg <- mapped_yeast$data$entrez %>%
  na.omit() %>%
  unique() %>%
  as.character()
length(yeast_bg)
```
MOUSE background
```{r}
mouse_entrez <- map_mouse_ensg_to_entrez(mouse_fpkm)

mouse_bg <- mouse_entrez$entrez %>%
  na.omit() %>%
  unique() %>%
  as.character()
length(mouse_bg)
```
 Foreground DEG sets from homolog table + intersect 
 
```{r}
yeast_deg <- mouse_yeast_hom %>%
  pull(yeast_entrez) %>%
  na.omit() %>%
  unique() %>%
  as.character()

mouse_deg <- mouse_yeast_hom %>%
  pull(mouse_entrez) %>%
  na.omit() %>%
  unique() %>%
  as.character()

yeast_deg <- intersect(yeast_deg, yeast_bg)
mouse_deg <- intersect(mouse_deg, mouse_bg)

length(yeast_deg); length(yeast_bg)
length(mouse_deg); length(mouse_bg)
```
 
 
 
```{r}
ego_yeast_bp <- enrichGO(
  gene          = yeast_deg,
  universe      = yeast_bg,
  OrgDb         = org.Sc.sgd.db,
  keyType       = "ENTREZID",
  ont           = "BP",
  pAdjustMethod = "BH",
  pvalueCutoff  = 0.01,
  qvalueCutoff  = 0.2,
  readable      = FALSE
)

ego_mouse_bp <- enrichGO(
  gene          = mouse_deg,
  universe      = mouse_bg,
  OrgDb         = org.Mm.eg.db,
  keyType       = "ENTREZID",
  ont           = "BP",
  pAdjustMethod = "BH",
  pvalueCutoff  = 0.01,
  qvalueCutoff  = 0.2,
  readable      = TRUE
)

```


 
 
```{r}

dotplot(ego_yeast_bp, showCategory = 12) +
  ggtitle("Yeast GO BP enrichment") +
  theme(axis.text.y = element_text(size = 7))

dotplot(ego_mouse_bp, showCategory = 12) +
  ggtitle("Mouse GO BP enrichment") +
  theme(axis.text.y = element_text(size = 7))


```
```{r}
shared_go <- intersect(ego_mouse_bp$ID, ego_yeast_bp$ID)

shared_terms <- tibble(
  GO_ID = shared_go,
  term  = ego_mouse_bp$Description[match(shared_go, ego_mouse_bp$ID)]
) %>% distinct()

shared_terms
```
 
```{r}
library(VennDiagram)

grid.newpage()
venn.plot <- draw.pairwise.venn(
  area1 = nrow(ego_mouse_bp),
  area2 = nrow(ego_yeast_bp),
  cross.area = length(shared_go),
  category = c("Mouse", "Yeast"),
  fill = c("skyblue", "violetred"),
  alpha = 0.5,
  cat.pos = c(-20, 20),
  cex = 1.2,
  cat.cex = 1.2
)
```

```{r}
heatmap_all <- bind_rows(
  as_tibble(ego_mouse_bp) %>% mutate(species = "Mouse"),
  as_tibble(ego_yeast_bp) %>% mutate(species = "Yeast")
) %>%
  mutate(
    logpadj = -log10(`p.adjust`),
    shared  = ID %in% shared_terms$GO_ID
  )

top_terms <- heatmap_all %>%
  group_by(Description) %>%
  summarise(min_padj = min(`p.adjust`, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop") %>%
  arrange(min_padj) %>%
  slice_head(n = 20) %>%
  pull(Description)

heatmap_top <- heatmap_all %>%
  filter(Description %in% top_terms) %>%
  mutate(
    Description = factor(Description, levels = rev(top_terms)),
    Description = Description |>
      str_replace_all("ribosomal", "ribo.") |>
      str_replace_all("biogenesis", "biogen.") |>
      str_replace_all("processing", "proc.") |>
      str_replace_all("modification", "mod.") |>
      str_wrap(40)
  )

p1 <- ggplot(heatmap_top, aes(x = species, y = Description, fill = logpadj)) +
  geom_tile(color = "white") +
  geom_point(
    data = subset(heatmap_top, shared),
    aes(x = species, y = Description),
    color = "navy", size = 2, shape = 8
  ) +
  scale_fill_gradient(low = "white", high = "violetred") +
  labs(
    x = "", y = "GO BP Term", fill = "-log10(adj p-value)",
    title = "Top 20 GO BP Terms in Mouse and Yeast\n(shared terms marked in blue)"
  ) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 10) +
  theme(
    axis.text.y = element_text(size = 7),
    axis.text.x = element_text(size = 9),
    plot.title = element_text(size = 11, face = "bold")
  )

p1

```



```{r}
ggsave(filename = "../figures/top20_GO_heatmap_Mouse_Yeast.png", plot = p1, width = 8, height = 6)
```
